title: ToolcallExport
description: A durable distillation of a session's ephemeral tool-call capture (agency/capabilities/toolcalls/; Spec 336 S4). Recorded by toolcalls.export — the top calls + responses + new-spec suggestions, written FULL to .agency/sessions/<session>-toolcalls.md. SERVES the active intent and survives a prune of the high-volume ephemeral store.

session.description: The session id whose captured tool calls were distilled.

top_n.description: How many top tool-call shapes (by frequency × payload cost) the export listed.

suggestions.description: Count of new-spec suggestions generated (heuristic + optional LLM).
